## Framework

**Name:** 
**Language:** Python / TypeScript / Java / Go / Other
**Link:** 
**GitHub stars / popularity signal:** 

## Why Add Support

Why should g0 support this framework? Usage, unique attack surface, community demand, etc.

## How to Detect It

What files, imports, or patterns identify code using this framework?

```python
# Example imports or config
from my_framework import Agent, Tool
```

## What to Extract

What entities should g0 parse and surface?

- [ ] Agents (name, instructions, model)
- [ ] Tools (name, description, capabilities, side effects)
- [ ] Prompts / system instructions
- [ ] Models (provider, version)
- [ ] Multi-agent delegation / handoffs
- [ ] Config files (`.yaml`, `.toml`, etc.)

## Security Patterns Unique to This Framework

What agentic security issues are specific to or common in this framework?

- Framework docs:
- Security write-ups or advisories:
- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate
